Moves: 13th move for White.

Rank3: P7: a3 pawn, b3 empty, c3 empty, d3 empty, e3 empty, f3 empty, g3 empty, h3 empty. So Pa3.

White to move. Check for threats: White queen on g4 attacks g7? Actually g4 to g7: squares f5, e6, d7, c8? Wait queen moves horizontally, vertically, diagonally. Queen could go to f4? From g4 to f4 horizontal left. Is f4 attacked? Black queen b5 attacks f5? No. f4 is on rank4, is that attacked?
